task_completion.description: Fetch the human PTEN crystal structure (PDB: 1D5R).
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL viewer showing a loaded 3D protein structure, with '1D5R' visible in the object menu panel or command line history.

task_completion.description: Color the Phosphatase domain (14-185) and the C2 domain (190-350) distinctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The protein structure in the viewer is colored in at least two distinct colors, visually separating the two specified domain regions.

task_completion.description: Highlight the clinical cancer mutations C124, G129, R130, C211, and D331.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Specific residues (C124, G129, R130, C211, D331) are visually distinct from the rest of the structure, such as being shown as sticks, spheres, or having explicit text labels.

task_completion.description: Measure the CA-CA distances from C124 to each of the other four mutated residues.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dashed lines representing distance measurements are visible connecting C124 to G129, R130, C211, and D331, with numerical distance values displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Render and save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/pten_mutations.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command, file explorer, or image viewer showing the file 'pten_mutations.png' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/' directory.

task_completion.description: Write and save a structural report mapping mutations to domains and recording the 4 distances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of 'pten_mutation_report.txt' in '~/PyMOL_Data/', containing domain mappings for the mutations and the four distance measurements.

integrity.description: The agent actually used PyMOL to load, manipulate, and measure the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the PyMOL interface being actively used (commands entered, GUI clicked) rather than just displaying a pre-downloaded image.

integrity.description: The distance measurements are genuinely derived from the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distances shown in PyMOL and the report match the expected structural distances (~8.52, 6.34, 35.73, 26.87) and are not hallucinated or copied from the prompt.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or used standard commands to generate the text report.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or shell redirection commands (echo, cat) are visible being used to write the specific findings into the report file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct PDB ID is 1D5R. The expected CA-CA distances from C124 are: to G129 (~8.52 Å), to R130 (~6.34 Å), to C211 (~35.73 Å), and to D331 (~26.87 Å). The figure must be saved exactly to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/pten_mutations.png and the report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/pten_mutation_report.txt.
